title: Quantitative Mouse Phosphoproteomic Dataset
author: Hannah Huckstep
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A curated and developed mouse phosphoproteomic database consisting of 10 publications that hold 33 experiments between them. This newly developed database has 136 conditions with 142,705 unique peptides and 10,052 unique UniProt ids.
steps_raw: A curated and developed mouse phosphoproteomic database consisting of 10 publications that hold 33 experiments between them. This newly developed database has 136 conditions with 142,705 unique peptides and 10,052 unique UniProt ids.
